tasks.label: CMake: Build (release)
args: conan install . --output-folder=build --build=missing -pr profiles/default -s build_type=Release && cmake --preset release && cmake --build --preset release -j

tasks.label: CMake: Build (debug)
args: conan install . --output-folder=build --build=missing -pr profiles/default -s build_type=Debug && cmake --preset debug && cmake --build --preset debug -j
